Seed Launch Prelaunch
Module 6
Your Prelaunch Content…
• Since the launch is usually done to a small list,
you can usually be very informal
• The actual Prelaunch Content doesn’t have to
be meaty – it can be more pitch than content
• Remember, the pitch is often the “reluctant
hero,” so it tends to be understated
Your Prelaunch Content…
• It can usually be done via email
• Many Seed Launches are 100% email
• You can also use a blog
• A simple blog post giving solid information
• You can also use video
• Can be done VERY informally
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
The “Reluctant Hero” is pretty simple…
• I love this stuff…
• But I never wanted to teach it…
• Even though lots of people ask me to…
• But now, because ___________, I’ve finally
decided to spill the beans
Social Proof
• Is automatically implied by “so many people have
asked me to teach this”
• But stronger if you can parrot back responses
during your Prelaunch
• e.g. if your first piece of Prelaunch Content –
people comment on that blog post or email
back – and you can show those comments and
replies in your Sales Letter
Scarcity works great
• Unfortunately, since this is going to be an
interactive class…
• I’m going to have to limit the number of
attendees
• If you’re interested, please sign up right away
before it fills up
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
